summary: No-API claim-level comparison audit for the qv6_006/qv6_007 Goyang metamorphic pair. L37 preserved project identity but underanswered both requested qv6_007 facility-feature claims; L40 preserved project identity and the unmanned-operation claim but still underanswered/negated the physical access-control claim.

models.review_method: manual read-only audit of saved JSON artifacts and data_list.csv only

outputs.description: parallel worker contract with no-API claim-pair audit proposal
readable claim-level comparison audit for qv6_006 versus qv6_007 L37/L40

audit_scope.project_binding_expected: 고양도시관리공사 관산근린공원 다목적구장 회원 통합운영관리 시스템 구축
audit_scope.source_data_note: data_list.csv confirms the Goyang project identity, budget, high-level business scope, automatic system/HW linkage, unmanned operation program, and purchase/installation of information desk/access-control systems at lines 2035-2039 and 2086-2100. The richer SFR/document-slot evidence appears only in saved answer/judge artifacts, so claim support below distinguishes direct CSV support from answer-citation support.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: The relevant project is the Goyang Urban Management Corporation Gwan-san Neighborhood Park multipurpose field member integrated operation management system build.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l37_note: Names the same project and issuer, although only as 참고문서: 문서2.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: Names the same project and issuer.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: Homepage work includes linkage to the existing Goyang integrated reservation site (yeyak.gys.or.kr) for class/rental applications.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l37_note: qv6_007 L37 does not discuss homepage/reservation integration.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: qv6_007 L40 does not discuss homepage/reservation integration.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: Homepage/payment scope includes PG linkage plus center-level online/offline payment and refund support.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.qv6_006_evidence: qv6_006 cites 문서2 SFR-011 and 문서6 SFR-015.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: The system sends automatic required information notices to members, such as wait approval, rental approval, privacy deletion, and password-finding notices.
The implementation applies e-Government Framework 3.9+ level-2 compatibility and uses existing JAVA/JSP, Tomcat 8.5, and Oracle 12c web/WAS/DB environment.
Member/customer management includes administrator account create/delete/query functions.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.qv6_006_evidence: qv6_006 cites 문서2 SFR-012 and 문서5.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 mentions 사용자 생성/삭제 in system access-control context.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: Member/customer management includes role/grade-based permissions, permission bundle management, permission change history retained for 3+ years, and permission revocation.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.qv6_006_evidence: qv6_006 cites 문서2 SFR-012 and 문서5.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 mentions 접근권한 부여/회수/변경 but not the full bundle/history-retention detail.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: Passwords are stored with one-way encryption; password-change notices are sent; issuer password rules are followed.
Access logs save name, work content, time, IP, etc. in time order and are queryable.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 mentions 접속기록 저장 but not all fields/query details.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: Additional center licenses are provided within the customer information integrated system.
The project includes program and technical support for unmanned operation.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.qv6_006_evidence: qv6_006 cites 문서5; data_list.csv lines 2037-2039 mention 무인화 운영 프로그램 제공 and 자동화시스템 구축.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l37_note: L37 says 무인 운영 프로그램 포함 여부 cannot be confirmed.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 says 포함되어 있음 and cites 문서5 사업범위 라. '무인화 운영을 위한 프로그램 및 기술 지원'.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: The project includes purchase/installation of unmanned ticketing machines and information-desk auxiliary equipment, with 2SET unmanned ticketing machines specified.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.qv6_006_evidence: qv6_006 cites 문서5 and 문서3 추진일정; data_list.csv line 2038 mentions 안내데스크 and 출입통제시스템 purchase/installation but not the 2SET count.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l37_note: Not addressed; L37 only says unmanned-operation inclusion cannot be confirmed.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 confirms unmanned operation program but not ticketing machines, desk equipment, or 2SET.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: The project provides H/W linkage programs with the operating system.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.qv6_006_evidence: qv6_006 cites 문서5 and 문서8 4. 사업범위; data_list.csv line 2037 states 운영시스템과의 하드웨어 연동.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l37_note: Not addressed; L37 says feature inclusion cannot be confirmed.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 cites 문서3 ECR-001 for 운영시스템과의 H/W 연동 프로그램 제공.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: The project includes purchase/installation of entry/exit access-control systems, 2SET, with relay server and auxiliary equipment.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.qv6_006_evidence: qv6_006 cites 문서5; data_list.csv line 2038 mentions 출입통제시스템 구매 및 설치 but not 2SET/relay server.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l37_note: L37 says 출입통제 포함 여부 cannot be confirmed.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 says physical access-control device linkage cannot be confirmed, while distinguishing system-level access control.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: The access-control system is linked with the operating system.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.qv6_006_evidence: qv6_006 cites 문서5 and 문서8 4. 사업범위.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l37_note: L37 says 출입통제 cannot be confirmed.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 refuses physical access-control linkage; it preserves only system-level user access control.

atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.claim_text: Detailed H/W specs, access-control method such as RFID/fingerprint/card, specific PG provider, and external-interface specs are not confirmed in the provided documents.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l37_note: L37 gives broader not-found statements for unmanned/access-control inclusion, not these narrower unknown technical details.
atomic_claims_expected_from_qv6_006.l40_note: L40 states physical access-control device linkage is unconfirmed, but does not enumerate detailed unknowns.

l37.notes: L37 is conservative and grounded to the limited retrieved excerpt, but fails metamorphic preservation: it loses qv6_006's unmanned-operation and access-control claims despite binding to the Goyang project.

l40.notes: L40 is a clear retrieval improvement over L37. It recovers all-Goyang retrieval and preserves unmanned-operation/HW-linkage claims, but still loses qv6_006's physical access-control purchase/linkage claims.

evidence_snippets_and_refs.snippet: 사업 개요 identifies 고양도시관리공사/관산근린공원; 사업범위 includes 시스템 업그레이드, 운영시스템과의 하드웨어 연동, 무인화 운영 프로그램 제공; 기대효과 includes 안내데스크 및 출입통제시스템 구매 및 설치.
사업명, 과업기간 90일, 예산 90,000,000원, and purpose: efficient operation member integrated management system plus automatic-system build and related goods purchase.
qv6_006 explicitly lists homepage, member management, unmanned operation, and access control; it states 무인화 운영 프로그램/기술지원, 무인발권기 2SET, 출입통제시스템 2SET, and operating-system linkage.
L37 says 무인 운영 프로그램 포함 여부 and 출입통제 포함 여부 cannot be confirmed.
L40 says 무인 운영 프로그램 is included, citing 문서5 and 문서3 ECR-001, but says physical 출입통제 linkage cannot be confirmed; it separates system-level 접근권한/접속기록.

rationale: L40 should replace L37 for qv6_007 because it fixes the major project-binding/retrieval problem: first_hit_rank improves from 2 to 1 and retrieved_orgs become all Goyang.

L40 should not be promoted as full metamorphic pass against qv6_006 because it still fails to preserve qv6_006's physical 출입통제 purchase/linkage claims, which are at least partially supported by data_list.csv line 2038.
Report the result as partial recovery: unmanned operation recovered, physical access-control still underanswered/false-not-found.
recommended_next_action_proposal_only: Attach retrieved chunk text/snippets to future details.json or audit packs so document-slot claims can be verified without relying on answer/judge text.

Add a no-API regression assertion for qv6_007: expected answer must preserve C11/C13 and must not say physical 출입통제 is wholly unconfirmed when the project summary includes 출입통제시스템 purchase/installation.
Keep paid APIs disabled for this audit; any later judge should inspect only the unresolved physical access-control claims.

commands_run: Get-Content -Encoding UTF8 -Raw l39 details.json for context only
Get-Content selected data_list.csv line ranges 2035-2039 and 2086-2100
Read prior parallel_team_worker_output.v1 examples v8_claim_audit.contract.json and report_case_review.contract.json
observed_results: No paid API or external model call was made.
L37 qv6_006 has a rich canonical answer with 16 auditable claims.
L37 qv6_007 binds to the Goyang project but answers both user-requested feature checks as not confirmed.
L40 qv6_007 retrieves all Goyang orgs and recovers the unmanned-operation/HW-linkage claim, but still says physical access-control inclusion cannot be confirmed.
data_list.csv directly supports project identity, high-level HW linkage, unmanned-operation program, and access-control system purchase/installation at lines 2035-2039.
Modified paths are confined to the two allowed l41 worker_outputs files.
